name_en: Premium Original Leather M24880 The Black Out collection presents the Capucines Souple Large Handbag, a magnified version of a classic design rendered in glossy Taurillon calfskin and refined metal hardware, accented with the iconic V monogram. The neat interior features multiple pockets, easily accommodating A4 documents. Dimensions: 38 × 23 × 16 cm
